name: Marketing Cloud Release Notes – 16 Apr 2024
body: [{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"OVERVIEW:","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In this release, we have launched a new segment category in our newly refurbished Next Generation Segment Builder."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Kindly read ahead to know more!!"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"ENHANCEMENT:","bold":true}]},{"type":"h4","children":[{"text":"A NEW SEGMENT CATEGORY","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"We have added a new category in our Next Generation Segment Builder known as “"},{"text":"Purchase Activity","bold":true},{"text":"”. This allows you to fetch contacts who have made purchases from your store previously."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"There are 4 segment rules clubbed in this segment category. They are, namely, "},{"text":"Purchased Products, Converted Campaigns, Placed Orders, ","bold":true},{"text":"and"},{"text":" Lifetime Value","bold":true},{"text":". You can use these segment rules to filter and fetch contacts that fulfill such purchasing criteria. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Below is a layout of the Purchase Activity rulesets and their attributes in the Next Generation Segment Builder page. "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/segment25.0685g00000NJEfIAAX.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/segment25.0685g00000NJEfIAAX.png","name":"Purchase Activity Segment Rules Layout","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":3300,"width":2755}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn more about such rulesets being applied during segment creation, read our "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Segment-Rules-in-Next-Gen-Segment-Builder","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Segment Rule (Next-Generation)","bold":true}]},{"text":" article. "}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In addition to segment rules, read our "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Creating-Segments-with-Next-Gen-Segment-Builder","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Creating Segments with Next-Gen Segment Builder","bold":true}]},{"text":" article to understand the basic guidelines for creating a segment."}]}]
